'''dhahugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hideosity|hideosity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hideosity|hideosity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhahugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæhigith|dhæhigith]] || [[word:dhæhigij|dhæhigij]] || [[word:dhæhigish|dhæhigish]] || [[word:dhæhigi|dhæhigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhahuhuguth|dhahuhuguth]] || [[word:dhahuhuguj|dhahuhuguj]] || [[word:dhahuhugush|dhahuhugush]] || [[word:dhahuhugu|dhahuhugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhahuguth|dhahuguth]] || [[word:dhahuguj|dhahuguj]] || [[word:dhahugush|dhahugush]] || [[word:dhahugu|dhahugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhahufgufth|dhahufgufth]] || [[word:dhahufgufj|dhahufgufj]] || [[word:dhahufgufsh|dhahufgufsh]] || [[word:dhahufguf|dhahufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhahuguthu|dhahuguthu]] || [[word:dhahuguju|dhahuguju]] || [[word:dhahugushu|dhahugushu]] || [[word:dhahuguku|dhahuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhahuguth|dhahuguth]] || [[word:dhahuguj|dhahuguj]] || [[word:dhahugush|dhahugush]] || [[word:dhahugu|dhahugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhahuguthul|dhahuguthul]] || [[word:dhahugujul|dhahugujul]] || [[word:dhahugushul|dhahugushul]] || [[word:dhahugukul|dhahugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhahuguuthuthu|dhahuguuthuthu]] || [[word:dhahuguujuju|dhahuguujuju]] || [[word:dhahuguushushu|dhahuguushushu]] || [[word:dhahuguuku|dhahuguuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhahuguthun|dhahuguthun]] || [[word:dhahugujun|dhahugujun]] || [[word:dhahugushun|dhahugushun]] || [[word:dhahugukun|dhahugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhahuguthuoro|dhahuguthuoro]] || [[word:dhahugujuoro|dhahugujuoro]] || [[word:dhahugushuoro|dhahugushuoro]] || [[word:dhahugukuoro|dhahugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|c579b50}}
